message:
🌱 Fix sidebar spacing and update footer to Console-first (#1214)

- Increase vertical spacing between sidebar project items (space-y-0.5 → space-y-1.5)
- Increase nav item spacing (space-y-1 → space-y-1.5)
- Update footer description to Console-first ecosystem messaging
- Update footer Docs links: Console, Quick Start, Marketplace, MCP Server

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
